title: festuca rupicaprina
intro: Festuca rupicaprina, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca rupicaprina are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy.
